title: Mysterious Contractor
description: This mod adds the Mysterious Contractor, you'll never get to see him, but he sees you. He occasionally provides you with a task, going from easy to somewhat difficult, with great rewards!
body:
Welcome to the Mysterious Contractor! This mod adds the Mysterious Contractor, an entity that is technically not an entity, but it's there trust me!

The Mysterious Contractor occasionally provides you with a little task, which you can choose to do at any time, if you do it will provide you with a reward that fits your task's difficulty well.

Quests can vary from simple quests, like kill 13 zombies, or 12 spiders. Not for you? It also adds rougher quests that involve killing the most dangerous creatures of all, like the Ravager, or other well-equipped players! Careful now, you can risk your life getting wrecked by these mobs, but all progress on quests resets if you die!

This mod is intended to be played on multiplayer, as the Legendary Quest requires you to be able to kill players. I will at some point release an update that changes this to something else in Singleplayer! :)
